The Program

Activators are built different.

Understand yourself.

Become a leader by leveraging philosophy, entrepreneurship, and personalized mentorship.

Understand the world.

Become a systems thinker and someone who can solve impactful problems.

Make your project real.

Become someone who creates value for end users and multiple stakeholders.

Student Voices

"Activate has been an amazing experience and has helped me grow a community of people who genuinely want to see others succeed. It's been a driving factor at points of discomfort, and I couldn't be more thankful."

Valkyrie Holmes
CEO & Cofounder of Faura
3.5M+ raised from a TKS project

Student Voices

"Honestly, one of the best attributes of the program has been how adaptive things have been to our feedback. The community part has been stellar. Everyone's on the same page."

Sri Anumakonda

Carnegie Mellon Robotics Researcher
Masason Scholarship Recipient through TKS

"The mentorship pushed me to actually step up and start building. They told me I was too young and inexperienced. That's when it clicked that I could just go build it myself."

Muhammad Hunain

Techstars Graduate, CEO/Cofounder of Melagen Labs
500K+ raised from TKS Project

Your Directors

Shea Tough

Activate Director

Shea is a geneticist and former pharmaceutical consultant with Johnson & Johnson. After finishing her Masters Degree from Western University, she left pharma and declined medical school admission to found a private biotech startup incubator (FCSB) to support early stage synbio entrepreneurs. She raised $1M+ to support over 50 startups in bringing their products from lab to market.

Ravi Ravindran

Activate Director

Ravi is a serial entrepreneur who founded three companies before the age of 24. He holds a B.Sc. in Neuroscience and Psychology from UofT and an Executive MBA from Schulich. As Entrepreneur-in-Residence at UofT, he helped 158 startups commercialize research. He serves on Canada's Semiconductor Council and has consulted on $786 million in infrastructure projects with the federal government.

Is This You?

Activate is for you if...

✓

You want to build projects that add value to the world.

✓

If you want to answer the question: "What do I want to be known for?"

✓

You want to disrupt the status quo & question old assumptions.

Investment

Two payment options.

Monthly

$489/mo

$1,000 deposit + 10 payments
Total: $5,890 USD

Save $500

Single Payment

$5,390

One payment, done.
$500 discount applied.

Program sessions run on Friday, Saturday, or Sunday.
Financial aid packages available on a merit and need basis on a first-come, first-served basis.

How to Join

Three steps.

01

Apply

Submit by May 1, 2026.

02

Interview

Virtual or in-person group interview.

03

Enroll

Accept your offer and lock in your spot.
